EXTERIOR — Cara 1 (portada) + Cara 4 (contraportada)
Circular Engineering
for the Mechatronics
of Tomorrow
面向未来机电一体化的循环工程
Lizarte is a Spanish company with over 50 years of history that remanufactures steering systems for the automotive industry through mechatronic circular engineering, present in more than 15 European countries with OEM and Tier 1 clients in the independent aftermarket.
利萨特（Lizarte）是一家拥有逾50年历史的西班牙企业，专注于通过机电一体化循环工程对汽车转向系统进行再制造，业务覆盖欧洲15个以上国家，服务于独立售后市场中的整车厂（OEM）及一级供应商（Tier 1）客户。
www.lizarte.com/en
Why Lizarte · 为何选择利萨特
Certified by European OEMs and Tier 1 suppliers under IATF 16949 standards
已通过IATF 16949标准认证，获得欧洲整车厂及一级供应商认可
Trusted partner in the European Independent Aftermarket across 15+ countries
拥有欧洲独立售后市场15个以上国家的可信赖合作伙伴
53 years of specialised remanufacturing expertise — no generalist shortcuts
53年专注再制造，唯有深耕，拒绝捷径
Major Independent Aftermarket European International Trading Groups:
主要欧洲独立售后市场国际贸易集团：
AAG · AD · ATR · NEXUS · TEMOT · Global One

INTERIOR — Cara 2 (Who We Are) + Cara 3 (What We Do)
Who We Are · 关于我们
Mission · 使命
Remanufacturing with the quality of the original, with a team committed to outstanding service and excellence.
拥有一支致力于卓越服务与精益求精的团队，始终以原厂品质进行再制造。
Vision · 愿景
By 2030, we will be the European reference in the remanufacturing of steering systems and mechatronics.
到2030年，成为欧洲转向系统与机电一体化再制造领域的标杆企业。
